generated_assessment.reasoning: This 31-year-old woman is highly extraverted and agreeable, with very low openness to experience (13th percentile) and very high emotional stability. The high extraversion and gregariousness may orient her toward social media and peer validation instead, further nudging trust away from 'mainstream' journalism.
